name: Nike Lemerchier
description: Nike is the fourth princess of the Rain Dukedom, a mysterious and isolated country. She also has the power to call forth the rain.

A student in the Ultimate Academy for Gifted Juveniles and a participant of the Killing School Semester featured in _Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony_. He doesn't remember his talent at the beginning of the Killing Game, so his title is the Ultimate ???. Rantarou is a carefree and relaxed individual who comes across as rather mysterious. name: Reika Shimohira
description: She is a beautiful, young and popular idol. Like almost everyone else, she is caught in the line of fire during Izumi's killing spree in Shinjuku. She develops a crush on Kurono after seeing him in action during her first night as a participant in the game. Surprisingly enough, she proves to be a formidable opponent against the Aliens. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Shinku
description: The fifth Rozen Maiden doll and the first to appear in the series. She embodies the traditional Victorian aristocrat. Her favorite words are "tea", "servant" and "What?" She regularly and nonchalantly delivers physical punishment to Jun, her medium, and in her own eyes, her servant. She sees it as her duty not only to discipline Jun as her servant, but also to guide him as a guardian. Shinku may seem cold and unappreciative, but she is highly protective of and cares deeply for her sisters and fo

name: Thistle
description: __Height:__ 130 cm Thistle is the mage responsible for the creation of the dungeon on The Island and a jester who served in the court of King Delgal during the Golden Age. His actions make him the primary antagonist of the manga Delicious in Dungeon . As the lord of the dungeon, the Lunatic Magician has a great amount of power over both the structure of the dungeon and the monsters that inhabit it. His lifespan has also been extended by the dungeon's power. He is incredibly loyal and protective

name: Yuusei Shirosaki
description: __Height:__ 181 cm He is the chief of the Planning and Sales department at Minette whose concentration at work is high and his performance is good. In matters outside of work, he gets easily distracted and often makes mistakes.

name: Hinako Yaotose
description: A High school girl living a quiet life in a seaside town, but she feels somewhat detached from her friends during the summer months. She lost her family on a trip when she was six years old. She has a deep, logical, calm and introverted personality. Rarely, she attracts aggressive monsters to her, including sea monsters from the shore. She seems to have signs of PTSD.

name: Iori Izumi
description: He's Mitsuki Izumi's younger brother who has a "cool" personality. His parents run a cake shop called “Fonte Chocolat”, and the interior is decorated cutely, which influences him to like cute things in the end.

name: Isaburo Sasaki
description: Sasaki Isaburo is the commander of Mimawarigumi. His character is based on the leader of the real Mimawarigumi, Sasaki Tadasaburo. Sasaki Isaburo was born into the elite samurai family Sasaki, as the main heir. He is also the half brother to Sasaki Tetsunosuke. His personality is completely different when writing e-mails by cellphone. He insists people to call him Sabu-chan and states that he doesn't have many friends. He cannot express his feelings well by speaking, so he usually texts with his

name: Kaoru Nishimi
description: __Height__: 168 cm (5'6") Kaoru is a brainy young man who moved during the summer of his first year in high school, from Yokosuka to his uncle's house in Kyushu. In fact, Kaoru has been moving from place to place ever since he was a little kid, a lifestyle that has made him introverted. But after Kaoru encounters Sentaro, he started to change, all while learning the joys of jazz. Kaoru has been familiar with classical music for many years and is quite the pianist, so naturally he's on piano.

name: Nene Sakura
description: **Birthplace:** Tokyo **Height:** 144 cm Aoba's friend from high school who is currently in university. She took an interest in programming and eventually became an intern at Eagle Jump after beta testing Fairies Story 3. Nene is described as childish, selfish, and goofy by Aoba, who can't stay focused on the task given to her, which is why she's often seen leaving her post. She is also an otaku and a fan of Faries Story Series.

name: Sadayo Kawakami
description: She is a Japanese teacher and homeroom teacher of Class 2-D at Shujin Academy. She is shown to be very cautious and act coldly towards Ren Amamiya due to the fact that he has a criminal record to him and thought of him as nothing but a problem student, even going as far as asking for homeroom reassignment at first. name: Shinji Tokita
description: He is a third year Mechanical Engineering student at Izu University.

name: Si-Yun Baek
description: A mysterious man who enters Jeongmin's lucid dreams.

name: Su-Ho Lee
description: __Height:__ 6'1 Suho is very studious in academics, unlike Ju-Gyeong and Seojun, and spends most of his free time studying. He is a talented cook and generally stays away from social media. He was best friends with Seojun in middle school. ~!Later in the series, he leaves to care for his father in japan for around 3 years - leaving the relationship he had built with Ju-Gyeong behind.!~ ~!They later meet again and proceed to officially start dating - getting engaged later in the series.!~

name: Katyusha
description: She's Captain of the Pravda High School team. Since she always gets remarks on her short stature, she is called the Tiny Tyrant.

name: Michiru Fukuroi
description: Year 2, class A at Yubiwa Academy Middle School. He is a dangerous person who tops the "ranking of students who should never be involved in the school." He is known as "the bossman" outside of school, but he is also a good cook and has a family-oriented side. He has a habit of using a lot of satirical metaphors.

name: Osamu Mikumo
description: Osamu Mikumo is one of the main protagonists of World Trigger and is a member of the Border with low Trion level. He joined the Border after Jin saved him. He is usually referred as simply "Four Eyes" by people outside the Mikumo unit. ~!He is later promoted into B-Class Border and later became a Shooter and the leader of the Mikumo Unit.!~

name: Reiji Sakamaki
description: __Race:__ Vampire __Height:__ 183 cm Reiji is the 2nd son in the family. He is a very strict type. Reiji is the one who takes care of the household and of all his younger brothers while Shuu, who is the one supposed to be doing this, slack off. Because of Shuu's lazy behaviour, Reiji hates him and is jealous of his position of eldest son of the family as Shuu gets all the attention. Even though he's usually gentle, he insults Yui terribly, yet he's also a sadist vampire. ~! Reiji hired a vampire

name: Sanae Ebato
description: Sanae is introduced to the series as the best friend of the main character, Hanabi. She is shown to be a supportive character in the beginning, but when they're alone, she tends to be very possessive. ~!Her ill feelings towards men began when she was almost molested by a man on the train, although saved by Hanabi, leaving her scared. Sanae begins to have romantic feelings towards Hanabi as the story progresses.!~
